heading: Disclosures to governmental agencies
label: 1681f Disclosures to governmental agencies
text: Notwithstanding the provisions of , a consumer reporting agency may furnish identifying information respecting any consumer, limited to his name, address, former addresses, places of employment, or former places of employment, to a governmental agency.section 1681b of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective upon the expiration of one hundred and eighty days following , see , as added by , set out as a note under .Oct. 26, 1970section 504(d) of Pub. L. 90–321Pub. L. 91–508section 1681 of this title
